meaning: n.[迚ｩ]逕ｨ雜ɾｯｼ(逕ｵ)菴鍋噪蟇ｼ逕ｵ,雜ɾｯｼ(逕ｵ) 諤ｧ
examples: The principles and advantages of superconduction magnetic levitation type linear motor cars are described. And problems needing to be solved in making the transport are discussed.
Superconduction Tokamak, especially full superconduction Tokamak, thus has become the research area for constructing the future advanced thermonuclear reactor project, and physics frontiers;
High temperature superconduction Maglev Measurement system is a kind of main test system for offering experiment data, in order to study high temperature superconduction magnetically levitated train.
